name: Spicy Peanut Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 medium green pepper, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
2. Spray a large skillet with vegetable oil spray.
3. Place the skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the chicken and green pepper to the hot skillet.
5. Cook for 5 minutes or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink.
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients: peanut butter, soy sauce, ginger, and garlic.
7. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, about 3 more minutes.
